series_metadata.series_description: The Hospital Reimbursement Review Bill Worksheets contain the injured worker claim numbers and billing information; which are populated from a data warehouse report. This worksheet is simply used to help bill reviewers do research faster than looking up the information in the BWC system. The reviewer may make notes on the worksheet with additional research findings.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Hospital Reimbursement Review Bill Worksheets , provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is release, and
